package.name: FreeCAD Agent
package.description: Local-AI copilot for FreeCAD: turns natural-language requests into real modeling actions, from a single operation to a whole multi-step component. Runs on a LOCAL model via Ollama (privacy-first, nothing leaves your machine) on top of an unmodified FreeCAD base (an add-on, not a fork). The add-on talks to a separate AI engine over a local JSON-RPC bridge; the engine turns natural language into structured CAD commands (14 commands, Part workbench) executed inside undoable transactions. When the vocabulary is not enough it can run free Python, always shown to the user first. MVP: results depend on the model, tested on Windows; macOS/Linux experimental. Structured commands work without Ollama.

workbench.name: FreeCAD Agent
workbench.description: Panel to talk to the local AI engine and run structured commands.
